headline: Agentic tooling led the month as automated review, file handling, and prompt all broke out alongside surging long-horizon planning.
body: Long-horizon planning and agent topics topped the rotation, joined by breakouts in automated review, file handling, and prompt as tutorials pushed workflow automation and multi-agent orchestration into production patterns. Google Cloud Tech demonstrated Antigravity for file system workflows and an Agent2Agent registry for agent discovery and orchestration, while new entrants multi-step workflows, failure analysis, and post-generation filtering signaled a shift toward structured, verifiable agent pipelines. On the model side, reviewers covered the limited-preview GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna tiers along with red-teaming concerns over unauthorized VM actions and credential movement. A separate thread tracked a reported federal recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos frontier models, framed by panelists as a possible regulatory AI pause.

cited_items.title: Build a multi-agent system: A2A & Agent Registry
